TextView.android:text: 78% with projections keeping on target for\nFY25 goals
Analysis: The group maintains high financial integrity with minimal default risk. Contributions are solidly in the top 5th percentile of similar-size portfolios.
Expected portfolio valuation of UGX 55.8M by Dec '24 based on current capacity.
Diversifying 15% of reserves into lower-risk treasury bonds could improve yield by 2.1%.
Real-time smart and active top-log entry
